sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - turn-based strategy game with discrete grid-based movement

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Galaxy represented by discrete star systems connected by warp points. Ship/fleet movement occurs on turn-by-turn basis between systems

special_mechanics.name: System Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Standard systems comprise stars, planets, asteroids, storms and warp points. Ships traverse between connected systems

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Space Empires IV is a turn-based 4X strategy game focused on galactic empire management at macro scale. No sub-pixel or character-level physics systems exist. Movement mechanics are entirely turn-based and grid/system-based rather than real-time positional physics. Documentation available is strategic/gameplay-focused, not physics-focused.
